Hello from the popup!

This is the song of our lives. YES YES

options: Do a little dance to celebrate

elements.content: First, do you remember the order of operations?

We just learned two rules.

Let's learn the rest!

× and ÷
from left to right

+ and -
from left to right

+ and -
from left to right

× and ÷
from left to right
